groundingPolicy: Only mappings explicitly present in brain/04_SUNO.md are allowed.

paper_diorama.text: light guitar or piano, paper-rustle sound design optional, quiet and revealing.

clay_diorama.text: muted plucked strings (toy piano, music box, glockenspiel). Hand-made warmth.

pixar_feature.text: warm orchestral — solo piano lead, sustained strings in support, occasional soft brass swell. Friendly and adventurous. Never ominous or ironic.

watercolor_storybook.text: acoustic guitar or piano, soft woodwinds (flute, recorder), gentle plucked strings. Warm, tender, unhurried. No driving rhythm.

arcane_painterly.text: low brass undertone, tense string col legno, amber harmonic warmth over a dark bass. Cinematic pressure without trailer cliché.

arcane_undercity.text: low brass undertone, tense string col legno, amber harmonic warmth over a dark bass.

verse_edu.text: energetic melodic synth lead, driving snare and hi-hat, kinetic synth stabs. Controlled intensity, not chaos.

verse_miles.text: energetic melodic synth lead, driving snare and hi-hat, kinetic synth stabs. Controlled intensity, not chaos.

verse_gwen.text: delicate piano or harp arpeggios, soft sustained strings, light brushed percussion at most. Flowing and graceful, never driving. No kinetic synth stabs.

verse_noir.text: sparse noir jazz — lone muted trumpet or upright bass, brushed kit, smoky sustained chords. Tension through space, not energy. No kinetic synth stabs.

anime_edu.text: energetic melodic synth lead, driving snare and hi-hat, kinetic synth stabs. Controlled intensity, not chaos.

anime_cel.text: energetic melodic synth lead, driving snare and hi-hat, kinetic synth stabs. Controlled intensity, not chaos.

demon_slayer_visual.text: cinematic orchestral with traditional Japanese instrumentation — taiko swell, shakuhachi or koto motif over sustained strings. Builds to the FX bloom, settles on the held ring. Dignified intensity, no synth-pop.

ghibli_storybook.text: acoustic guitar or piano, soft woodwinds (flute, recorder), gentle plucked strings. Warm, tender, unhurried. No driving rhythm.

ghibli_felt_edu.text: acoustic guitar or piano, soft woodwinds (flute, recorder), gentle plucked strings. Warm, tender, unhurried.

chalk_universe.text: lo-fi acoustic, muted upright piano, nostalgic warmth, slight room ambiance. No clean digital production.

flat_vector_cartoon.text: playful synth or muted brass, punchy percussion, bright stabs on key moments. Energetic but never aggressive.

shadow_puppet.text: acoustic oud or frame drum at low volume, theatrical restraint.

book_theater.text: light guitar or piano, paper-rustle sound design optional, quiet and revealing.

wood_diorama.text: single marimba or prepared piano with clear attack. Mechanical and precise, each note timed to a mechanism click.

felt_diorama.text: muted plucked strings (toy piano, music box, glockenspiel). Hand-made warmth.

stained_glass.text: solo organ or choir pad, slow and ceremonial. Light and space as sonic identity.

graphic_poster_world.text: bold brass hits on downbeats, driving 4/4 rhythm, civic confidence. Clean and declarative.

oil_painted_classic.text: sparse strings or period ensemble (harpsichord, lute, solo violin). Dignified, legato, no percussion. Museum gravity.

cinematic_real.text: low dark synth drone, slow warm string pad, cinematic pulse. Atmospheric and serious, no orchestral peaks.

clay.text: muted plucked strings (toy piano, music box, glockenspiel). Hand-made warmth.

paper.text: light guitar or piano, paper-rustle sound design optional, quiet and revealing.

wood.text: single marimba or prepared piano with clear attack. Mechanical and precise, each note timed to a mechanism click.

museum.text: sparse strings or period ensemble (harpsichord, lute, solo violin). Dignified, legato, no percussion. Museum gravity.

fabric.text: muted plucked strings (toy piano, music box, glockenspiel). Hand-made warmth.

painterly_shadow.text: low brass undertone, tense string col legno, amber harmonic warmth over a dark bass. Cinematic pressure without trailer cliché.
